events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a field review of classified-area wiring methods at the rough-complete stage. The description says everything looks good: expected unit in intended location, nameplates and orientation marks readable, no damage, matches referenced detail. No defects or non-compliance are flagged.

So decision should be "pass", risk "low", work_stage "rough-complete", component_conditions empty, percent_complete maybe 85 or so for rough-complete, confidence high, findings empty, actions empty, rationale brief, references NEC 500-516.
